title: Zydus Wellness Appoints Harvard-Trained Scientist Dr Shyam Ramakrishnan as CSO
summary: New Delhi: Zydus Wellness Limited has announced the appointment of Dr Shyam Ramakrishnan as Chief Scientific Officer (CSO), effective July 1, 2026.The appointment, approved by the Board of Directors...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
New Delhi: Zydus Wellness Limited has announced the appointment of Dr Shyam Ramakrishnan as Chief Scientific Officer (CSO), effective July 1, 2026.

The appointment, approved by the Board of Directors based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, reinforces the company's commitment to advancing science-led innovation and strengthening its research and development capabilities.

With this appointment, Zydus Wellness aims to further strengthen its scientific leadership and innovation pipeline, and accelerate the development of differentiated, science-backed products across its wellness portfolio.

As Chief Scientific Officer, Dr Ramakrishnan will lead the company's scientific strategy, driving innovation across nutrition, health and wellness while strengthening research capabilities to develop consumer-centric, science-backed products.

Dr Ramakrishnan brings more than 25 years of global experience across nutrition, dietary supplements, beauty, personal care and functional foods. He has held leadership roles across the United States, India, Southeast Asia. and Brazil, with deep expertise in translational science, clinical research, bioinformatics and innovation platform development.

Prior to joining Zydus Wellness, he held leadership positions at Hill's Pet Nutrition, The Himalaya Drug Company, ITC Ltd. and Amway, where he led multidisciplinary teams and drove innovation across the consumer health and wellness portfolio.

Dr Ramakrishnan holds a PhD in Biological Chemistry & Genetics from the University of Texas and has completed postdoctoral fellowships at Harvard Medical School and Hoffmann-La Roche.

Zydus Wellness is a consumer wellness company with an Indian heritage and a global footprint. With more than 35 years of operational excellence, Zydus Wellness has leading brands in its portfolio, namely RiteBite Max Protein, Complan, Sugar Free, Sugar Free D’lite, Glucon-D, Nutralite, I’m Lite, Everyuth, and Nycil. Headquartered in Ahmedabad, the company has 4 manufacturing facilities across Aligarh, Ahmedabad, and Sikkim, besides more than 20 co-manufacturing facilities in India, New Zealand, UAE, and Bangladesh.

The company’s customers represent more than 70 million families. With its business underpinned by a robust manufacturing facilities and global supply chains, Zydus Wellness supports more than 90,000 dairy farmers, 5000 families, and 2000 MSMEs.

Zydus Wellness Limited is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange and the National Stock Exchange of India, and it serves customers in more than 37 countries and 5 continents.
